messages.text: This ticket needs your approval before it can proceed. Reply here with "approve" to approve it.

messages.author: swarm
messages.text:
What it is: Shell and babashka test harnesses must clean up their temp dirs (the BL-420 prevention gap)
What it solves: EXPEDITE (Operator directive, 2026-07-16): a real, tracked bug — promote ahead
of the paused queue. Do NOT "fix" it by a silent rm of the 377k dirs; the
BL-413 sweep clears the STOCK, this ticket stops the shell/bb FLOW at source.
How it works: A shell or babashka test harness removes its temp root on BOTH a clean exit and a failing exit
